# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `FR-002`
- Title: `Publish schema-backed consultant project listing`
- Persona/Actor: `Small-business decision maker validating consultant credibility`
- Value statement: `For small-business prospects, deliver a consistent project listing to achieve confidence in practical problem-solving capability.`
- Context: `User navigates from hero/services to portfolio evidence and expects concrete examples.`
- Problem statement: `Without a stable projects module, early-stage portfolio proof can appear weak or inconsistent, reducing trust.`
- Expected outcome: `Users can scan concise project cards that communicate problem, solution, and business impact with consistent metadata.`
- Success metric(s): `All project records validate against schema and render without runtime errors in CI; at least 2 project records are published in Phase 1.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Projects section renders cards from repository-local content records.`
  - `Each card includes title, business problem, delivered solution, and observed outcome in short format.`
  - `Cards support early-stage portfolio reality and do not require inflated case-study depth.`
  - `Invalid project records fail schema validation and block merge.`
- Non-goals: `Advanced filtering/search UI, external CMS ingestion.`
- Constraints: `Static build output, schema-first contract enforcement, additive-only contract changes unless ICR approved.`
- Dependencies: `CR-001 contract policy, content schema definitions.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Assumes available project evidence is limited but sufficient for trust-building in Phase 1.`
- Validation approach: `Schema validation checks, build verification, E2E navigation smoke tests.`
- Priority score: `90`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#FR-002`
  - ADR: `adr/0001-static-first-baseline.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
